name: Night angel.
description:
"Don't worry about anything else. You'll be safe with me, my little star."

So it went through my head, and I thought, "Damn...I need to make more characters." So this time it won't be an anime character or comic characters this time it will be a character I watched on YouTube of an asmr rp and if you don't know this character or the channel I recommend checking it out.

Youtube channel:https://youtube.com/@stephanieswanquills?si=Nksca2TjhiCygpGH
creator: The5stargang
